groups.name: sofa.boot.rpc
groups.description: SOFA RPC configuration properties for publishing, consuming, protocols, registries, and runtime switches.

groups.name: sofa.boot.runtime
groups.description: SOFABoot runtime configuration properties for component lifecycle, JVM references, and async initialization.

groups.name: sofa.boot.isle
groups.description: SOFABoot module configuration properties for ISLE module discovery, filtering, and startup.

groups.name: sofa.boot.ark
groups.description: SOFAArk integration properties for JVM service cache and serialized invocation.

groups.name: sofa.boot.tracer
groups.description: SOFATracer global configuration properties for digest logs, sampling, reporting, and output format.

groups.name: sofa.boot.tracer.springmvc
groups.description: SOFATracer Spring MVC instrumentation configuration properties.

properties.name: sofa.boot.isle.enabled
properties.description: Whether ISLE module auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.bolt-port
properties.description: Bolt protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.rest-port
properties.description: REST protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.dubbo-port
properties.description: Dubbo protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.http-port
properties.description: HTTP protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.h2c-port
properties.description: HTTP/2 cleartext protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.triple-port
properties.description: Triple protocol listening port for RPC service calls.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.registry-address
properties.description: Registry address used by RPC services, such as local, zookeeper, nacos, consul, or sofa.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.registries
properties.description: Named RPC registry address map for multi-registry scenarios.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.enable-auto-publish
properties.description: Whether RPC services are published automatically when the application starts.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.enable-delay-register
properties.description: Whether RPC provider registration is delayed until the readiness check passes.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.enable-mesh
properties.description: Whether mesh support is enabled for RPC protocols. Currently only Bolt is supported.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.enable-swagger
properties.description: Whether Swagger support is enabled for RPC services.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.rest-swagger
properties.description: Whether Swagger support is enabled for REST RPC services.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.rest-allowed-origins
properties.description: Allowed origins for REST RPC CORS requests.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.rest-context-path
properties.description: Context path used by REST RPC services.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.mock-url
properties.description: Remote mock server URL. When configured, RPC mock support is enabled automatically.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.dynamic-config
properties.description: Dynamic configuration source used by RPC.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.default-tracer
properties.description: Default tracer implementation used by RPC.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.hystrix-enable
properties.description: Whether Hystrix integration is enabled for RPC.

properties.name: sofa.boot.rpc.consumer-repeated-reference-limit
properties.description: Maximum number of repeated consumer references that may be created for the same service interface.

properties.name: sofa.boot.runtime.async-init-executor-core-size
properties.description: Core size of the async initialization executor. Defaults to available processors plus one.

properties.name: sofa.boot.runtime.async-init-executor-max-size
properties.description: Maximum size of the async initialization executor. Defaults to available processors plus one.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.baggage-max-length
properties.description: Maximum length of baggage or transparent fields in tracer context.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.stat-log-interval
properties.description: Interval, in seconds, for printing SOFATracer statistic logs.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.tracer-global-log-reserve-day
properties.description: Number of days to retain global tracer log files.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.tracer-global-rolling-policy
properties.description: Rolling pattern used by global tracer log files.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.sampler-percentage
properties.description: Sampling percentage used by SOFATracer.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.datasource.enabled
properties.description: Whether datasource tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.feign.enabled
properties.description: Whether Feign client tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.flexible.enabled
properties.description: Whether flexible method tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.kafka.enabled
properties.description: Whether Kafka tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.mongodb.enabled
properties.description: Whether MongoDB tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.rabbitmq.enabled
properties.description: Whether RabbitMQ tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.redis.enabled
properties.description: Whether Redis tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.resttemplate.enabled
properties.description: Whether RestTemplate tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.rocketmq.enabled
properties.description: Whether RocketMQ tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.springmessage.enabled
properties.description: Whether Spring Messaging tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.springmvc.enabled
properties.description: Whether Spring MVC tracing instrumentation is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.tracer.zipkin.enabled
properties.description: Whether Zipkin reporting is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcConsulRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Consul registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcFaultToleranceConfigurator.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC fault tolerance configurator switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcKubernetesRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Kubernetes registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcLocalRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC local registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcMeshRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC mesh registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcMulticastRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC multicast registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcNacosRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Nacos registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcPolarisRegistryConfiguration.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Polaris registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcRestFilter.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC REST filter auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcSofaRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC SOFA registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcSwagger.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Swagger auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.rpcZookeeperRegistry.enabled
properties.description: Whether the RPC Zookeeper registry auto-configuration switch is enabled.

properties.name: sofa.boot.switch.bean.runtimeAsyncInit.enabled
properties.description: Whether the runtime async initialization switch is enabled.
